title: Positive flow: Selecting a country from the list
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the location selection screen. | Locate the list of countries and select a country from the list.
expected_result: The selected country should be highlighted or marked as the current selection.

title: Negative flow: Attempting to select a non-existent country
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the location selection screen. | Locate the list of countries and attempt to select a country that is not in the list.
expected_result: An error message or notification should appear indicating that the selected country is not available.

title: Boundary validation: Selecting the first country in the list
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the location selection screen. | Locate the list of countries and select the first country in the list.
expected_result: The selected country should be highlighted or marked as the current selection.

title: Boundary validation: Selecting the last country in the list
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the location selection screen. | Locate the list of countries and select the last country in the list.
expected_result: The selected country should be highlighted or marked as the current selection.

title: Toggle state: Selecting a country and then unselecting it
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the location selection screen. | Locate the list of countries and select a country. | Locate the list of countries and unselect the previously selected country.
expected_result: The previously selected country should no longer be highlighted or marked as the current selection.

title: Navigation: Navigating back to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the location selection screen. | Locate the back arrow in the header and tap it to navigate back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The application should navigate back to the previous screen.

title: Usability: Searching for a country
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the location selection screen. | Locate the search icon in the header and tap it to activate the search functionality. | Enter a country name in the search bar and tap the search icon.
expected_result: The application should display the search results for the entered country name.

title: Accessibility: Testing keyboard navigation
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the location selection screen. | Locate the list of countries and use the keyboard to navigate through the list. | Select a country using the keyboard.
expected_result: The selected country should be highlighted or marked as the current selection.
